title: hieracium alpinum subsp. subvitellicolor
intro: Hieracium alpinum subsp. subvitellicolor, also known as Alpine Hawkweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alpine Hawkweed may include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Alpine Hawkweed can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in folk remedies for its purported health benefits.
